# RushAEO - Technical Documentation Context Index

## Core Architectural Focus
RushAEO operates as an automated technical forensic website gap-analysis utility built to navigate the strict transparency requirements of the EU AI Act (Article 50). The platform executes point-in-time system inspections using a proprietary 43-point V-I-N-G Standard framework.

## Repository Documentation Maps
*   **Primary Layout:** `index.html` - Main landing layout containing visual pricing anchors ($1,499 USD/mo) and public entry interface systems.
*   **Remediation Blueprints:** `remediation-blueprints.md` - Technical frontend notice injection blocks (HTML/CSS) for multi-lingual system disclosure compliance layers.
*   **Diagnostics & Testing:** `diagnostics-matrix.md` - System diagnostic codes (e.g., ERR_VIS_01, ERR_ID_14), exception handling timeout boundaries, and local sandbox webhook bypass validation keys.

## System Boundaries & Disclaimers
*   **Zero Data Retention (ZDR):** Processing operates strictly inside isolated, ephemeral cloud sandbox containers that self-destruct instantly post-compilation. 
*   **Operational Scope:** The system completely omits the issuance of formal EU Declarations of Conformity and does not provide Authorized Representative (AR) legal representation services. Customers source external legal counsel independently.
